ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ministries" (
  "ministry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ministry */,
  "ministry_name" TEXT /* Name of the ministry or government agency */,
  "head_of_ministry" TEXT /* Name of the head of the ministry */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the ministry */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the ministry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ministry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget allocation */,
  "ministry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ministry receiving the budget */,
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fiscal year for the budget allocation */,
  "wages_and_salaries" TEXT /* Allocated budget for wages and salaries */,
  "goods_and_services" TEXT /* Allocated budget for goods and services */,
  "capex" TEXT /* Allocated budget for capital expenditures */,
  "total" TEXT /* Total allocated budget */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the budget */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the budget was created */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User who approved the budget */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date when the budget was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_fiscal_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("fiscal_year_id") REFERENCES fiscal_years ("fiscal_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_ministry_id FOREIGN KEY ("ministry_id") REFERENCES ministries ("ministry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenditures" (
  "expenditure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expenditure transaction */,
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the budget allocation */,
  "expenditure_date" TEXT /* Date of the expenditure */,
  "wages_and_salaries" TEXT /* Actual expenditure for wages and salaries */,
  "goods_and_services" TEXT /* Actual expenditure for goods and services */,
  "capex" TEXT /* Actual expenditure for capital expenditures */,
  "total" TEXT /* Total actual expenditure */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who recorded the expenditure */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the expenditure was recorded */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the expenditure */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Name of the vendor or supplier */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expenditure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expenditure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditures_budget_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_id") REFERENCES budgets ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditures_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fiscal_years" (
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fiscal year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the fiscal year */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the fiscal year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the fiscal year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fiscal_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_proposals" (
  "proposal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget proposal */,
  "ministry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ministry submitting the proposal */,
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fiscal year for the proposal */,
  "proposed_wages" TEXT /* Proposed budget for wages and salaries */,
  "proposed_goods" TEXT /* Proposed budget for goods and services */,
  "proposed_capex" TEXT /* Proposed budget for capital expenditures */,
  "proposal_status" TEXT /* Status of the proposal (e.g., submitted, approved, rejected) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who submitted the proposal */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the proposal was submitted */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User who approved the proposal */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date when the proposal was approved */,
  "rejection_reason" TEXT /* Reason for rejection if the proposal was rejected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proposal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_proposals_fiscal_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("fiscal_year_id") REFERENCES fiscal_years ("fiscal_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_proposals_ministry_id FOREIGN KEY ("ministry_id") REFERENCES ministries ("ministry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_proposals_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_proposals_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., finance officer, ministry representative, auditor) */,
  "ministry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ministry the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the ministry to which the user belongs */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_ministry_id FOREIGN KEY ("ministry_id") REFERENCES ministries ("ministry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Previous value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES expenditures ("expenditure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the budget allocation */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* User who resolved the alert */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_budget_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_id") REFERENCES budgets ("budget_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "ministry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ministry for which the report is generated */,
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fiscal year of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who generated the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, quarterly, annual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_ministry_id FOREIGN KEY ("ministry_id") REFERENCES ministries ("ministry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_fiscal_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("fiscal_year_id") REFERENCES fiscal_years ("fiscal_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role has administrative privileges */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
